framework.name: Logging Security Recommendations
framework.name_nl: Recommandations de securite pour la journalisation
framework.issuing_body: Agence nationale de la securite des systemes d'information (ANSSI)
framework.scope: Technical recommendations for implementing secure logging in information systems
framework.structure_description: Recommendations covering what to log, log format standardization, log collection architecture, log storage, integrity protection, retention, and analysis.

controls.title: Define a logging policy
controls.description: Establish a formal logging policy defining what events to log, retention periods, access controls, and analysis frequency.
controls.description_nl: Etablir une politique de journalisation formelle definissant les evenements a journaliser, les periodes de conservation, les controles d'acces et la frequence d'analyse.

controls.title: Log authentication events
controls.description: Log all authentication attempts (success and failure), password changes, and privilege escalation.
controls.description_nl: Journaliser toutes les tentatives d'authentification (succes et echecs), changements de mots de passe et escalades de privileges.

controls.title: Log access to sensitive data
controls.title_nl: Journaliser les acces aux donnees sensibles
controls.description: Log all access to sensitive data including reads, modifications, and deletions with user identity and timestamp.
controls.description_nl: Journaliser tous les acces aux donnees sensibles incluant les lectures, modifications et suppressions avec l'identite de l'utilisateur et l'horodatage.

controls.title: Log administrative actions
controls.description: Log all administrative actions: configuration changes, user account management, security policy modifications.
controls.description_nl: Journaliser toutes les actions administratives : changements de configuration, gestion des comptes utilisateurs, modifications des politiques de securite.

controls.title: Log network security events
controls.title_nl: Journaliser les evenements de securite reseau
controls.description: Log firewall decisions, IDS/IPS alerts, VPN connections, and proxy activity.
controls.description_nl: Journaliser les decisions de pare-feu, alertes IDS/IPS, connexions VPN et activite du proxy.

controls.title: Standardize log format
controls.description: Use a standardized log format (CEF, syslog RFC 5424, or JSON structured) across all systems for correlation.
controls.description_nl: Utiliser un format de journal standardise (CEF, syslog RFC 5424 ou JSON structure) sur tous les systemes pour la correlation.

controls.title: Synchronize time sources
controls.description: All systems generating logs shall synchronize their clocks via NTP to a common authoritative time source.
controls.description_nl: Tous les systemes generant des journaux doivent synchroniser leurs horloges via NTP sur une source de temps de reference commune.

controls.title: Centralize log collection
controls.description: Deploy a centralized log collection infrastructure (SIEM) to aggregate logs from all sources.
controls.description_nl: Deployer une infrastructure centralisee de collecte des journaux (SIEM) pour agreger les journaux de toutes les sources.

controls.title: Protect log transmission
controls.description: Log transmission from sources to the central collector shall use encrypted channels (TLS syslog, HTTPS).
controls.description_nl: La transmission des journaux des sources vers le collecteur central doit utiliser des canaux chiffres (syslog TLS, HTTPS).

controls.title: Ensure log integrity
controls.description: Implement integrity protection for stored logs using write-once storage, digital signatures, or hash chains.
controls.description_nl: Mettre en oeuvre la protection de l'integrite des journaux stockes par stockage non-reecrivable, signatures numeriques ou chaines de hachage.

controls.title: Define log retention periods
controls.title_nl: Definir les periodes de conservation des journaux
controls.description: Define retention periods based on regulatory requirements (RGPD, LPM) and security needs. Minimum 6 months for security events.
controls.description_nl: Definir les periodes de conservation en fonction des exigences reglementaires (RGPD, LPM) et des besoins de securite. Minimum 6 mois pour les evenements de securite.

controls.title: Restrict access to logs
controls.description: Access to log data shall be restricted to authorized security and audit personnel with role-based access control.
controls.description_nl: L'acces aux donnees de journalisation doit etre restreint au personnel de securite et d'audit autorise avec un controle d'acces base sur les roles.

controls.title: Implement log analysis and alerting
controls.title_nl: Mettre en oeuvre l'analyse et l'alerte sur les journaux
controls.description: Deploy automated analysis rules and alerts for security-relevant events including correlation across sources.
controls.description_nl: Deployer des regles d'analyse automatisees et des alertes pour les evenements pertinents pour la securite incluant la correlation entre les sources.

controls.title: Regular log review
controls.description: Conduct regular manual review of logs beyond automated alerting to detect subtle anomalies.
controls.description_nl: Conduire une revue manuelle reguliere des journaux au-dela des alertes automatisees pour detecter les anomalies subtiles.
